description: Standard cloud-native Windows deployment via Nova

steps.name: Set Computer Name
steps.description: Configure the Windows computer name with naming rules

steps.name: Download Windows Image
steps.description: Fetch the Windows ESD/WIM from Microsoft CDN or a custom URL

steps.name: Set Regional Settings
steps.description: Configure region, keyboard layout, and display language

steps.name: Partition Disk 1
steps.description: Create GPT (UEFI) or MBR (BIOS) layout on the target drive

steps.name: Download Windows Image
steps.description: Fetch the Windows ESD/WIM from Microsoft CDN or a custom URL

steps.name: Apply Windows Image
steps.description: Expand the Windows image onto the target partition

steps.name: Configure Bootloader
steps.description: Write BCD store and EFI/MBR boot entries

steps.name: Inject Drivers
steps.description: Add network and storage drivers from a local or network path

steps.name: Inject OEM Drivers
steps.description: Auto-detect manufacturer (Dell/HP/Lenovo) and fetch latest drivers

steps.name: Import Autopilot Device
steps.description: Register this device in Windows Autopilot via Microsoft Graph API

steps.name: Stage ConfigMgr Setup
steps.description: Stage ccmsetup.exe for first-boot ConfigMgr enrollment

steps.name: Customize OOBE
steps.description: Apply unattend.xml for out-of-box experience customization

parameters.unattendContent:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<unattend xmlns="urn:schemas-microsoft-com:unattend">
  <settings pass="oobeSystem">
    <component xmlns:wcm="http://schemas.microsoft.com/WMIConfig/2002/State" name="Microsoft-Windows-Shell-Setup" processorArchitecture="amd64" publicKeyToken="31bf3856ad364e35" language="neutral" versionScope="nonSxS">
      <OOBE>
        <HideEULAPage>true</HideEULAPage>
        <HideOEMRegistrationScreen>true</HideOEMRegistrationScreen>
        <HideOnlineAccountScreens>false</HideOnlineAccountScreens>
        <HideWirelessSetupInOOBE>false</HideWirelessSetupInOOBE>
        <ProtectYourPC>3</ProtectYourPC>
        <SkipMachineOOBE>false</SkipMachineOOBE>
        <SkipUserOOBE>false</SkipUserOOBE>
      </OOBE>
    </component>
  </settings>
</unattend>

steps.name: Enable BitLocker
steps.description: Enable BitLocker drive encryption with TPM protector on first boot

steps.name: Install Application
steps.description: Stage application installer for first-boot execution (Winget, MSI/EXE, or script)

steps.name: Windows Update
steps.description: Stage critical and security updates for installation on first boot

steps.name: Run Post-Provisioning Scripts
steps.description: Download and stage PowerShell scripts for first-boot execution
